headline: Wall Street sees new upswing for health insurers after years of margin pressure
summary: Investing.com -- Analysts turned more bullish on the managed care sector, upgrading shares of Humana, Centene, and Elevance Health to “Buy,” while downgrading The Cigna Group to “Hold” on valuation concerns.

headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: BJ’s Wholesale Club, Centene, Cigna, Crown Castle, ETSY, Franco-Nevada, Humana, Ovintiv, X-Energy, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher on the heels of the third straight day of stock declines, and there is growing apprehension that yields will go even higher and that inflation may as well. All of the major indices finished Tuesday lower, and with Q1 earnings all but over and the incoming economic data ... headline: Nasdaq Futures Climb as Bond Yields Fall, Nvidia Earnings in Focus
summary: June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are trending up +0.69% this morning as sentiment improved after Treasury yields retreated from multiyear highs, with attention now turning to an earnings report from chip giant Nvidia.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Centene, Raises Price Target to $58
summary: Mizuho  analyst Ann Hynes   maintains Centene (NYSE:CNC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $50 to $58.

headline: This CH Robinson Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Wednesday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts upgraded SM Energy, Rubrik Inc, CH Robinson Worldwide Inc, Elevance Health Inc, and Centene Corp. Analysts also have a positive outlook on CHRW stock.

headline: Deutsche Bank Upgrades Centene to Buy, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Deutsche Bank  analyst George Hill   upgrades Centene (NYSE:CNC) from Hold to Buy and raises the price target from $53 to $80.

headline: U.S. Health Insurers Raise EPS Estimates After Strong Q1'26, Higher Medicare Rates
summary: Q1 proved to be a boon for many major US managed care insurers, as earnings results exceeded consensus estimates, leading to rises in stock prices and higher full-year earnings estimates.
